titleStmt.title: SII 42.148: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 148. (A.R. No. 14 of 1955-56.) Saṅgam, Kovur Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the right wall of the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Saṅgamēśvara temple.
Dated Śaka 1473, Virōdhikṛit, Chaitra ba. 7, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1551, March 28. (The week day appears to be Saturday).

Registers a gift of the income derived from palmgrove raised at Saṅgam by Rāmireḍḍi, son of Koṇḍā-Mummaḍireḍḍi of Duvvūru, for the merit of Baicharājayya administering over the Udayagiri-rājya, the nāyaṅkara of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Yaram-Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju. Also registers another gift of land at Navūru and other villages in the nāyaṅkara of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla Parichchhedi Mummaya Dēvachōḍa-mahārāja. (Cf. N.D.I., Part II, No. 104).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1473 Agunēṁṭi virōdhikṛtu saṁvva
tsara caitra ba 7 Ā . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsi(śi) vadēva
mahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai prithivī sāmrājya
mu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju yaraṁ dirumalayyadē
vamahārājulayyavāri nāyaṁkarānaku celli(llē) vudayagiri rājyānaku Adhipati Ayina A
ṭuvaṁṭi kalūri baya(bai)carājayyavāriki puṇyamugānu duvvūri koṁḍā mummaḍireḍḍi
ṁgāri komāruṁḍu rāmireḍḍi saṁgamēśvaradēvuniki daṁḍaṁpeṭṭi sama¨rppiṁcci yiccina dha¨rmma śā
sanakramameṭlannanu vudayagiri rājyaṁlōni saṁgāmu staḷamaṁdunu tāmu vēyiṁccina tāḍlavanamuvalla vaccina
ṭaku rokhaṁ saṁgamēśvaruni dīpārādhanaku sāgēyaṭlugānu dhāravōsi sama¨rppiṁstimi [.] śrīmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Apratī
kamallapariceja(paricchēdi) mummayadēvacōḍa mahārājuluṁ gāriki nāyaṁkarānaku cellipaḍaśēstimi [.] duvvūri grāmāna
māku mānyaṁgānu mummaḍireḍḍipeṭṭina velicēnu vāṁtapāṭi polamē
ra rāviguṁṭa poṭladuṟuṇapu Aṁmana goṟiteṁḍu velicēnu Ācēni
tū¨rpu Aṁcuna goṟiteṁḍu cēnu kūḍānu nā vūranu reṁḍu
kālva velicēnu kollimiṟṟa nu māku pū¨rvvānanuṁḍḍi sāgi
vaccē yaduvaṁḍḍi mānyapucēnu maṟanūṁti paḍumaṭi cāyatōṁ
ppu varimaḍi muppayi guṁṭalunnu Āgrāmānē saṁgāṁ polamēra
kōṭagaṭṭu vu(U)ttarapu Aṁccuna goṟiteṁḍu velicēnu [.] yī reṁḍu grā
mālu nāvūru kollimi¨rlla staḷālavaccina dhānyamu saṁggamēśvara dēvuniki [A]
mṛtapaḷlaku Ayēṭaṭṭugā nunnu tāṭivanaṁ valla vaccina phalarokhaṁ dīpārādha
Digital edition of SII 42.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
